nodes.name: Condition
nodes.description: The core condition table contains information related to medical  conditions patients have, including problems, admitting diagnosis codes,  and billable diagnosis codes.

columns.name: condition_id
columns.description: Unique identifier for each condition in the table.

columns.name: person_id
columns.description: Unique identifier for each person in the dataset.

columns.name: member_id
columns.description: Identifier that links a patient to a particular insurance product or health plan. A patient can have more than one member_id because they can have more than one insurance product/plan.

columns.name: patient_id
columns.description: Identifier that links a patient to a particular clinical source system.

columns.name: encounter_id
columns.description: Unique identifier for each encounter in the dataset.

columns.name: claim_id
columns.description: Unique identifier for a claim. Each claim represents a distinct healthcare service or set of services provided to a patient.

columns.name: recorded_date
columns.description: Date when the condition was recorded.

columns.name: onset_date
columns.description: Date when the condition first occurred.

columns.name: resolved_date
columns.description: Date when the condition was resolved.

columns.name: status
columns.description: Status of the record (e.g., condition, test, etc).

columns.name: condition_type
columns.description: The type of condition i.e. problem, admitting, or billing.

columns.name: source_code_type
columns.description: The type of code reported in the source system (e.g., ICD-10 code, NDC, lab, etc)

columns.name: source_code
columns.description: The code in the source system (e.g., the ICD-10 code, NDC, lab, etc)

columns.description: Description of the source code in the source system.

columns.description: The normalized type of code.

columns.name: normalized_code
columns.description: The normalized code.
columns.terminologyNote: **Note: this terminology set is too large to be loaded as a seed and is instead loaded from public cloud storage for supported adapters.

columns.name: normalized_description
columns.description: Normalized description of the code.

columns.name: mapping_method
columns.description: mapping method used to populate the normalized codes and descriptions.  Can be manual (fields were populated in input layer), automatic (dictionary codes matching the source code were found and was automatically populated) or custom (populated by normalization engine)

columns.name: condition_rank
columns.description: The numerical ranking of the condition. For conditions derived from medical claims, condition_rank is set from the diagnosis code position on the claim, so diagnosis_code_1 becomes condition_rank = 1, diagnosis_code_2 becomes condition_rank = 2, and so on through diagnosis_code_25. For conditions sourced from the input layer condition table, this field is passed through without transformation from the mapped input value. A condition_rank of 1 indicates a primary diagnosis code, and any condition_rank greater than 1 indicates a secondary diagnosis code.

columns.name: present_on_admit_code
columns.description: The present_on_admit_code related to the condition.

columns.name: present_on_admit_description
columns.description: The description of the present_on_admit_code for the condition.

columns.description: User-configured field that indicates the data source.

columns.description: The last time the data was refreshed. Generated by `dbt_utils.pretty_time` as the local time of the `dbt run` environment. Timezone is configurable via the `tuva_last_run` var.

nodes.name: Encounter

nodes.name: ahrq_measures__stg_pqi_condition
nodes.description: Staging table for PQI condition, from core.condition.

nodes.name: ahrq_measures__stg_pqi_inpatient_encounter
nodes.description: Staging table for PQI inpatient encounters, serving as the basis for further PQI measure calculations.
nodes.sql:
{{ config(
    enabled = var('claims_enabled', False) | as_bool
) }}

select
    encounter_id
  , data_source
  , drg_code
  , drg_description
  , admit_source_code
  , encounter_start_date
  , encounter_end_date
  , length_of_stay
  , primary_diagnosis_code
  , person_id
  , facility_npi
  , paid_amount
  , {{ date_part('year', 'encounter_start_date') }} as year_number
from
    {{ ref('core__encounter') }}
where
    encounter_type = 'acute inpatient'

nodes.name: ahrq_measures__stg_pqi_member_months
nodes.description: Staging table for PQI member months, from financial_pmpm__member_months.
nodes.sql:
{{ config(
    enabled = var('claims_enabled', False) | as_bool
) }}

with

date_int as (
    select distinct
        replace(year_month, '-', '') as yyyymm
      , first_day_of_month
    from {{ ref('reference_data__calendar') }} as c
)

select
    data_source
  , person_id
  , first_day_of_month
  , d.yyyymm as year_month

from
    {{ ref('core__member_months') }} as mm
inner join date_int as d on mm.year_month = d.yyyymm

nodes.name: ahrq_measures__stg_pqi_patient
nodes.description: Staging table for PQI patient, from core.patient.

nodes.name: ahrq_measures__stg_pqi_procedure

nodes.name: ahrq_measures__int_pqi_01_denom
nodes.description: Denominator for PQI 01 measure calculation.
nodes.sql:
{{ config(
    enabled = var('claims_enabled', False) | as_bool
) }}

select distinct
    cast(substring(e.year_month, 1, 4) as int) as year_number
  , e.person_id
  , e.data_source
  , {{ datediff('p.birth_date', 'e.first_day_of_month', 'year') }} as age
  , cast('{{ var('tuva_last_run') }}' as {{ dbt.type_timestamp() }}) as tuva_last_run
from {{ ref('ahrq_measures__stg_pqi_member_months') }} as e
inner join {{ ref('ahrq_measures__stg_pqi_patient') }} as p
  on e.person_id = p.person_id
  and p.data_source = e.data_source
where
  {{ datediff('p.birth_date', 'e.first_day_of_month', 'year') }} >= 18

nodes.sql:
{{ config(

with resp_an as (
    select distinct
        encounter_id
      , data_source

    from {{ ref('ahrq_measures__stg_pqi_condition') }} as c
    inner join {{ ref('pqi__value_sets') }} as pqi

, union_cte as (

    union all

        encounter_id
      , data_source

    from resp_an
)

select
    encounter_id
  , data_source
  , exclusion_reason
  , row_number() over (

      order by exclusion_reason

  , cast('{{ var('tuva_last_run') }}' as {{ dbt.type_timestamp() }}) as tuva_last_run
from union_cte

    inner join access as a

    from cardiac

    union all

    select
        encounter_id
      , data_source
      , exclusion_reason
    from combine
)

  , data_source
  , exclusion_reason
  , row_number() over (
      partition by encounter_id, data_source
      order by exclusion_reason
    ) as exclusion_number
  , cast('{{ var('tuva_last_run') }}' as {{ dbt.type_timestamp() }}) as tuva_last_run
from union_cte

    inner join {{ ref('pqi__value_sets') }} as pqi
      on c.normalized_code = pqi.code
      and c.normalized_code_type = 'icd-10-cm'
      and pqi.value_set_name = 'traumatic_amputation_of_the_lower_extremity_diagnosis_codes'
      and pqi.pqi_number = '16'
    where c.encounter_id is not null
)

, pregnancy as (
    select distinct
        encounter_id
      , data_source
      , 'pregnancy' as exclusion_reason
    from {{ ref('ahrq_measures__stg_pqi_condition') }} as c
    inner join {{ ref('pqi__value_sets') }} as pqi
      on c.normalized_code = pqi.code
      and c.normalized_code_type = 'icd-10-cm'
      and pqi.value_set_name = 'mdc_14_principal_diagnosis_codes'
      and pqi.pqi_number = 'appendix_f'
    where c.encounter_id is not null
)

, union_cte as (
    select
        encounter_id
      , data_source
      , exclusion_reason
    from {{ ref('ahrq_measures__int_pqi_shared_exclusion_union') }}

    union all

    select
        encounter_id
      , data_source
      , exclusion_reason
    from amputation

    union all

    select
        encounter_id
      , data_source
      , exclusion_reason
    from pregnancy
)

select
    encounter_id
  , data_source
  , exclusion_reason
  , row_number() over (
      partition by encounter_id, data_source
      order by exclusion_reason
    ) as exclusion_number
   , cast('{{ var('tuva_last_run') }}' as {{ dbt.type_timestamp() }}) as tuva_last_run
from union_cte

nodes.name: ahrq_measures__pqi_rate
nodes.description: Table that combines numerator and denominator and calculates a rate per 100k
nodes.sql:
{{ config(
    enabled = var('claims_enabled', False) | as_bool
) }}

with num as (
    select
        data_source
      , year_number
      , pqi_number
      , count(encounter_id) as num_count
    from {{ ref('ahrq_measures__pqi_num_long') }}
    group by
        data_source
      , year_number
      , pqi_number
)

, denom as (
    select
        data_source
      , year_number
      , pqi_number
      , count(person_id) as denom_count
    from {{ ref('ahrq_measures__pqi_denom_long') }} as d
    group by
        data_source
      , year_number
      , pqi_number
)

select
    d.data_source
  , d.year_number
  , d.pqi_number
  , d.denom_count
  , coalesce(num.num_count, 0) as num_count
  , coalesce(num.num_count, 0) * 1.0 / d.denom_count * 100000 as rate_per_100_thousand
  , cast('{{ var('tuva_last_run') }}' as {{ dbt.type_timestamp() }}) as tuva_last_run
from denom as d
left outer join num
    on d.pqi_number = num.pqi_number
    and d.year_number = num.year_number
    and d.data_source = num.data_source

nodes.name: ahrq_measures__pqi_summary
nodes.description: Summary table for pqi numerators that bring in encounter details for analytics reporting.
nodes.sql:
{{ config(
    enabled = var('claims_enabled', False) | as_bool
) }}

select p.pqi_number
 , m.pqi_name
 , e.year_number
 , e.encounter_id
 , e.data_source
 , e.person_id
 , e.facility_npi
 , e.drg_code
 , e.drg_description
 , e.encounter_start_date
 , e.encounter_end_date
 , e.length_of_stay
 , e.paid_amount
 , cast('{{ var('tuva_last_run') }}' as {{ dbt.type_timestamp() }}) as tuva_last_run
from {{ ref('ahrq_measures__pqi_num_long') }} as p
inner join {{ ref('ahrq_measures__stg_pqi_inpatient_encounter') }} as e
    on p.encounter_id = e.encounter_id
    and p.data_source = e.data_source
inner join {{ ref('pqi__measures') }} as m on cast(p.pqi_number as {{ dbt.type_string() }}) = m.pqi_number
